title: Text to speech comparison
notes: Static comparison page generated from placeholder GOSVI prompt text.
Public data is sanitized: no API keys, generation IDs, raw headers, account exports, or local audit reports.
Only verified target-language samples are playable.

languages.sampleText: Добре дошли. Моля, изберете език. Използвайте стрелките, за да разгледате акцентите, маршрутите и видеата.
Dobro došli. Odaberite jezik. Koristite strelice za pregled istaknutih sadržaja, ruta i videozapisa.
Vítejte. Vyberte jazyk. Pomocí šipek si prohlédněte zajímavosti, trasy a videa.
Velkommen. Vælg et sprog. Brug pilene til at udforske højdepunkter, ruter og videoer.
Welkom. Kies een taal. Gebruik de pijlen om hoogtepunten, routes en video's te verkennen.
Welcome. Please select a language. Use the arrows to explore highlights, routes, and videos.
Tere tulemast. Palun valige keel. Kasutage nooli, et uurida esiletõstetud sisu, marsruute ja videoid.
Tervetuloa. Valitse kieli. Käytä nuolia tutkiaksesi kohokohtia, reittejä ja videoita.
Bienvenue. Veuillez choisir une langue. Utilisez les flèches pour explorer les temps forts, les itinéraires et les vidéos.
Willkommen. Bitte wählen Sie eine Sprache. Verwenden Sie die Pfeile, um Highlights, Routen und Videos zu erkunden.
Καλώς ήρθατε. Παρακαλώ επιλέξτε γλώσσα. Χρησιμοποιήστε τα βέλη για να εξερευνήσετε τα σημαντικά σημεία, τις διαδρομές και τα βίντεο.
Üdvözöljük. Kérjük, válasszon nyelvet. A nyilakkal fedezze fel a kiemelt tartalmakat, útvonalakat és videókat.
Fáilte. Roghnaigh teanga, le do thoil. Úsáid na saigheada chun buaicphointí, bealaí agus físeáin a iniúchadh.
Benvenuto. Seleziona una lingua. Usa le frecce per esplorare i contenuti in evidenza, gli itinerari e i video.
Laipni lūdzam. Lūdzu, izvēlieties valodu. Izmantojiet bultiņas, lai izpētītu izcēlumus, maršrutus un video.
Sveiki atvykę. Pasirinkite kalbą. Naudokite rodykles, kad peržiūrėtumėte svarbiausius akcentus, maršrutus ir vaizdo įrašus.
Merħba. Jekk jogħġbok agħżel lingwa. Uża l-vleġeġ biex tesplora l-punti ewlenin, ir-rotot u l-vidjows.
Witamy. Wybierz język. Użyj strzałek, aby odkrywać najważniejsze treści, trasy i filmy.
Bem-vindo. Selecione um idioma. Use as setas para explorar destaques, percursos e vídeos.
Bine ați venit. Vă rugăm să selectați o limbă. Folosiți săgețile pentru a explora punctele principale, traseele și videoclipurile.
Vitajte. Vyberte jazyk. Pomocou šípok preskúmajte zaujímavosti, trasy a videá.
Dobrodošli. Izberite jezik. S puščicami raziščite poudarke, poti in videoposnetke.
Bienvenido. Seleccione un idioma. Use las flechas para explorar los contenidos destacados, las rutas y los vídeos.
Välkommen. Välj ett språk. Använd pilarna för att utforska höjdpunkter, rutter och videor.

localBenchmark.hardware: MacBook Air Mac15,12, Apple M3, 24 GB RAM
localBenchmark.method: Cached local run on this MacBook Air; model download excluded. English GOSVI prompt, 92 characters.
localBenchmark.notes: CLI benchmark includes uvx startup, model load, and synthesis with cached weights; load was not split out.

localBenchmark.hardware: MacBook Air Mac15,12, Apple M3, 24 GB RAM
localBenchmark.method: Cached local run on this MacBook Air; model download excluded. English GOSVI prompt, 92 characters.
localBenchmark.notes: Run reached 3199/3200 token cap in about 3m09s, then failed during audio decode: torch.cat expected a non-empty list of Tensors.

localBenchmark.hardware: MacBook Air Mac15,12, Apple M3, 24 GB RAM
localBenchmark.method: Cached local run on this MacBook Air; model download excluded. English GOSVI prompt, 92 characters.

providers.label: NeuTTS
providers.engine: Local NeuTTS nano Q4 GGUF with distill-neucodec

localBenchmark.hardware: MacBook Air Mac15,12, Apple M3, 24 GB RAM
localBenchmark.method: Cached local run on this MacBook Air; model download excluded. English GOSVI prompt, 92 characters.
localBenchmark.notes: Includes reference voice encoding time separately; realtime factor uses synthesis time divided by output audio duration.

localBenchmark.hardware: MacBook Air Mac15,12, Apple M3, 24 GB RAM
localBenchmark.method: Cached local run on this MacBook Air; model download excluded. English GOSVI prompt, 92 characters.

providers.label: Chatterbox Multilingual
providers.engine: Local Resemble Chatterbox Multilingual V3, 0.5B LLM TTS

localBenchmark.hardware: MacBook Air Mac15,12, Apple M3, 24 GB RAM
localBenchmark.method: Cached local run on this MacBook Air; model download excluded. English GOSVI prompt, 92 characters.

providers.label: VoxCPM2
providers.engine: Local OpenBMB VoxCPM2 2B tokenizer-free LLM TTS via PyTorch MPS

localBenchmark.hardware: MacBook Air Mac15,12, Apple M3, 24 GB RAM
localBenchmark.method: Cached local run on this MacBook Air; model download excluded. English GOSVI prompt, 92 characters.
localBenchmark.notes: VoxCPM2 ran on MPS with bfloat16 adjusted to float32; torch.compile was disabled because this package only optimizes it on CUDA. The downloaded model cache was removed after sample generation to recover disk space.

providers.label: MOSS-TTS-Nano
providers.engine: Local OpenMOSS MOSS-TTS-Nano 0.1B ONNX CPU autoregressive Audio Tokenizer + LLM TTS

localBenchmark.hardware: MacBook Air Mac15,12, Apple M3, 24 GB RAM
localBenchmark.method: Cached ONNX CPU run on this MacBook Air; model download excluded. English GOSVI prompt, 92 characters, capped to 100 generated frames.
localBenchmark.notes: Used the ONNX CPU backend with the built-in Junhao voice, greedy sampling, 4 CPU threads, and per-language frame caps for short UI-prompt samples. The temporary clone was patched to lazy-load torch/torchaudio because built-in ONNX voices do not need reference-audio decoding.
